features: HEAD & SHOULDERS MAXIMUM DANDRUFF PROTECTION Pro-Expert 7 formulas have the highest level of anti-dandruff active, fighting 7 scalp issues for complete scalp protection
FIGHT EVEN THE TOUGHEST DANDRUFF Persistent dandruff control shampoo, infused with tea tree oil, is clinically proven to fight even the toughest dandruff*
COMPLETE SCALP PROTECTION IN 1 BOTTLE Fights persistent dandruff*, Rebalances Scalp, Controls oiliness, Deeply Cleans Pores, Fights itching**, Relieves Scalp, Reduces Hair Fall***
DERMATOLOGICALLY APPROVED by skin health alliance. Suitable for daily use
TRY HEAD & SHOULDERS BEST FORMULA backed up by 7 decades of scientific research
description: Product Description Pro-Expert 7 Persistent dandurff control Anti-dandruff Shampoo, infused with tea tree oil, contains the Head & Shoulders highest ever level of anti-dandruff active. This formula fights 7 scalp issues, giving you complete scalp protection and is clinically proven to fight even the toughest dandruff*, helping to cleanse and rebalance the scalp. Use every wash for maximum results. COMPLETE SCALP PROTECTION IN 1 BOTTLE: 1. Fights persistent dandruff*, 2. Rebalances Scalp, 3. Controls oiliness, 4. Deeply Cleans Pores, 5. Fights itching**, 6. Relieves Scalp, 7. Reduces Hair Fall*** *visible flakes from 2 ft, with regular use **itch related to dandruff, with regular use ***Hair retention due to improved scalp condition Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Xylenesulfonate, Piroctone Olamine, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Citrate, Parfum, Citric Acid, Dimethiconol, Sodium Chloride, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Dimethicone, TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, Sodium Salicylate, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium EDTA, Linalool, Sodium Hydroxide, Trideceth-10, Limonene, Hexyl Cinnamal, Geraniol, Hydroxycitronellal, Acetic Acid, Melaleuca Alternifolia Leaf Oil, Benzyl Alcohol, Triethylene Glycol, Propylene Glycol, CI 42090, CI 17200 Directions Apply to wet hair, massage into a lather, ensure full scalp coverage, and rinse thoroughly every time you wash your hair. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
